desc: Remove 'unsafe-inline' from Content-Security-Policy in Africa Watch by implementing per-request nonces. Two files must change in sync. FILE 1 — security-middleware.js: (a) Remove the top-level CSP_HEADER constant entirely (lines 9-15). (b) In attachSecurityMiddleware, replace res.setHeader('Content-Security-Policy', CSP_HEADER) with a nonce-based approach: generate a nonce per request using crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64'), attach it to res.locals.cspNonce, then set the CSP header as: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' cdn.jsdelivr.net 'nonce-{nonce}'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none' — note: keep unsafe-inline for style-src only (CSS inline styles are lower risk than JS), remove it from script-src and replace with the nonce. Use require('crypto') which is already available. FILE 2 — dashboard2.html: The file has inline <script> blocks at lines 341-573 and 703-1470. Each opening <script> tag (without a src attribute) must have the nonce attribute added: <script nonce='{{NONCE}}'> using a placeholder that the backend will replace. Add an Express middleware in security-middleware.js (or note in the patch) OR handle it differently: since dashboard2.html is served as a static file, add a dedicated GET /dashboard2.html route in kenya-watch-backend.js that reads the file, replaces all occurrences of the placeholder '{{NONCE}}' with res.locals.cspNonce, and sends it. The placeholder in dashboard2.html should be the literal string {{NONCE}}. Add nonce='{{NONCE}}' to all 3 inline script tags in dashboard2.html (lines 341, 703, and the one at line 125 which is an external script — skip that one, it already has a src). Return a combined unified git diff covering both files.
stack: Node.js, Express, HTML — security-middleware.js and dashboard2.html
instructions: Return a valid unified git diff only. No markdown. No code fences. No explanation. The diff must cover both files: a/security-middleware.js and a/dashboard2.html. For dashboard2.html, only add nonce='{{NONCE}}' to the two inline <script> blocks (those without a src attribute, at approx lines 341 and 703). Do not change any other HTML. The nonce generation in security-middleware.js must use require('crypto').randomBytes(16).toString('base64'). Also add a route handler for /dashboard2.html in the notes — but since we cannot patch kenya-watch-backend.js here, instead intercept the static serving: in security-middleware.js, export a serveDashboard(dashboardPath) function that returns an Express handler reading the file and replacing {{NONCE}} — document this at the bottom of the patch as a comment.
